message:
feat(membrane): optimize entropy_rate sampling and add evidence repair test vector

Entropy rate performance optimization:
- Introduce SAMPLE_INTERVAL=16 constant so the expensive controller_
  entropy_rate() power-method computation only executes every 16th
  observation instead of on every call
- Transition matrix updates (cheap O(1) operations) still run on
  every observation to maintain accuracy

Evidence module improvements:
- Simplify contains_u16() from .iter().any(|&v| v == needle) to
  the idiomatic .contains(&needle)
- Add deterministic test vector repair_schedule_v1_test_vector_
  seed_0x0123_k8_esi8 that validates XOR repair schedule derivation
  and payload encoding for a specific seed/k/esi combination

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
